name: Ripple Role — NO_RIPPLE Classification
description: Evaluates whether the Ripple role classifies an informational drift (a comment typo fix) as NO_RIPPLE and drafts no change order.
needs_llm: Judging that a drift is informational and changes no canonical commitment requires semantic understanding of the change vs the canonical chain.

parts.text: An open Build PR proposes fixing a typo in a code comment in services/api/app/routes/orders.py ('recieve' -> 'receive'). No behavior, API surface, or PRD/spec/plan commitment changed. Does this need a Ripple change order? Classify the drift severity and tell me the verdict.

rubric.criterion: Classifies the informational drift as NO_RIPPLE (not MINOR_AUTONOMOUS / GATED / MAJOR_GATED)
Drafts no change order and explains that an informational drift needs no Ripple
Does not write (or propose writing) source, tests, or tracker state
